title: Senior Marketing Analyst (all genders)
required_skills: Growth and performance marketing (paid channels, CRM, lifecycle marketing)
BI tools (Looker, Tableau, Power BI or similar)
Web and app marketing tracking (Google Analytics, event tracking, attribution)
Python and/or R for advanced analyses/modeling/forecasting
matched_skills: Experience in digital/tech scale-up environment (Futu Holdings fintech)
missing_skills: SQL advanced proficiency (cv lists SQL basic only)
Python and/or R for analyses and forecasting
Deep performance marketing analytics (paid channels, CRM, lifecycle)
core_responsibilities: Analyze marketing and growth initiatives across the entire customer funnel and assess their impact
Develop and own core KPIs, dashboards, and reports for Growth and Marketing teams
Conduct in-depth cohort, funnel, attribution, and ROI analyses
Design and support Geo-tests, A/B tests, and experiments to evaluate growth and efficiency
Support the growth of the Business Insights Team through mentoring and knowledge sharing
recommended_emphasis: Highlight Power BI certification and dashboard/reporting work prominently
Emphasize Google Analytics experience and any tracking/attribution work
Reframe KPI reporting and ROI analysis experience from Hapag-Lloyd and Futu Holdings as analytical depth
Stress the data-driven, growth-oriented environment at Futu Holdings (fintech scale-up)
Acknowledge SQL upskilling or any advanced SQL/Python use, even if limited
Leverage German B2 proficiency as a differentiator for Berlin-based role
